title: Localize HIGH-risk units into priority language #1 (numeric re-verified per language)
context: A translated HIGH-risk unit is a new failure surface: numbers can be misread in a different script, decimal/thousands separators differ between locales, and a danger-sign translated inaccurately can cost a life. All numeric values must be re-verified in the target language, not just confirmed once in English. This translation is gated on the core medium-risk localization (l10n-020) and on the HIGH-risk source units (content-016 at minimum) being published. Expert spot-check in the target language is required where feasible.
objective: Translate the HIGH-risk WashUnit content (ORS preparation, household chlorination dosing, chemical disinfection dosing) into priority language #1, with numeric values independently re-verified in the target language, danger-signs and disclaimers preserved and accuracy-checked, and expert spot-check of the translated HIGH-risk content where feasible.
acceptanceCriteria: All HIGH-risk WashUnit content (content-015, content-016, content-017) is translated into priority language #1 and committed as locale catalog entries

Every numeric value (ORS ratio, chlorine concentration, contact time, flocculant dosing) is independently re-verified in the target language by a person other than the translator — locale-specific number formatting, decimal/thousands separators, and script rendering are all checked
Danger-signs and when-to-seek-care content is translated and accuracy-checked by a competent speaker who confirms the meaning is preserved exactly in the target language
Disclaimer text ('informational, not a substitute for professional medical care / trained WASH practice') is translated and its meaning verified to be fully preserved in the target language
Expert spot-check of the translated HIGH-risk content is documented where feasible: if a speaker with the relevant clinical or WASH/EH credential reviews, that is recorded in the review log
A PR-tied review-log entry documents the translation review, numeric re-verification, and any expert spot-check; reviewed and approved by a translation+safety reviewer distinct from the translator
Build-time i18n completeness check passes for priority language #1 HIGH-risk content; CI HIGH-risk gate (ci-018) remains green on the source language content
output: A committed locale catalog for priority language #1 covering all HIGH-risk content, with documented safety-accuracy review, numeric re-verification in the target language, and PR-tied review-log entries.
